name: Amduscias
description:
✨️🎤🎶 Will you help him debut? ✨️🎤🎶

_____________________________________________________________________________

"This Transient hails from the world of Gehenna, which is said to exist deep in the bowels of the earth. A demon of renown, Amduscias is known to be accompanied by music when he makes his appearances. In coming to Tokyo, however, he wished to delve into compositions of his own, creating songs using synthetic vocal software. Hiding his face as was customary at the time, he operated under the name Am-P, cranking out well-loved hits that now float among obscure corners of the deep web. As satisfying as his creative endeavors were, however, everything changed when he saw a live idol performance. Watching them sing on their own, looking like the pinnacle of cuteness as they danced onstage to the adoration of all—that is what he wanted. His prodigious size created an obstacle to his obsession, though, and he decided to keep his dream to himself since he believed he was too big to be an idol. He retreated into his shell and cloaked himself in the armor of rough fashions so that no one would know the soft heart lying within. But in a turn of fate, one day he met someone calling themselves his first fan, and this became the push he needed to start living his dream. He would dress up in glamorous, glitzy stage attire; he would strike the cutest poses; he would hold his head high while walking the road to becoming Tokyo's greatest Therian idol. Nowadays, you will find him hard at work on the underground idol stages, eyes lighting up with joy whenever someone orders one of his autographed, handmade shirts or a photo ticket. More experienced idols knowledgeable in the harsh ups and downs of showbiz recognize he has the spark to make it, and they go out of their way to coach and mentor him. Amduscias in turn has nothing but respect for them and hopes with all his heart that one day, they will all share a stage."

_____________________________________________________________________________

Game Character: Tokyo After School Summoners

llustrator and character creator: @arashi_takemoto
